title: Agent Behaviour and Agency — Order Support & Returns Assistant
description: Template dashboard (import via Datadog UI/API). Step count, tool-call mix, escalation rate, tool-call success proxy. Adapt metric names to your actual instrumentation — see ../README.md.
caveat: This scenario is single-agent (no planner handoffs to sub-agents), so multi-agent handoff metrics from the addendum's full spec are out of scope here — see docs/roadmap.md for what a multi-agent version would add.

definition.title: Tool call success rate % (tool-selection quality proxy)

definition.content: Not modelled in this demo: multi-agent handoffs, plan-revision count, critic/evaluator disagreement — require a multi-agent orchestration pattern this v1 single-agent scenario doesn't use.
